prompt: Aerial straight-down view of the dark Mediterranean Sea at night. Hundreds of small personal belongings floating on the black water — worn leather shoes, a child's stuffed toy, folded clothing, a water-damaged photograph. Objects sparse near the viewer, growing impossibly dense toward the horizon. Deep blue-black water, cold moonlight. No boats, no people, no text, no land. Feels like a graveyard. Photorealistic, cinematic.
dataset_name: IOM Missing Migrants Project — Mediterranean Region
insight: Of the 34,400+ people who have died crossing the Mediterranean since 2014, the vast majority were never found — they became part of the sea itself, unrecovered and unnamed.
